case_title: WIEL, ISABEL VS DI SALVO TRUCKING COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WIEL, ISABEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DI SALVO TRUCKING COMPANY LAWLOR, CHARLES: PRESIDENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LAWLOR, CHARLES: PRESIDENT
NOT. OF JUDGMENT TO DEFEND. RETURNED.
